feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Visited Odin, Thor, and Freyr's burial mounds in Sweden 🇸🇪 Robin LOVES al things Viking history and Norse gods. We didn't have enough time to visit Uppsala on our first trip to Sweden but came back just to visit the Royal Mounds!! Legand says these three
entry.content: Visited Odin, Thor, and Freyr's burial mounds in Sweden 🇸🇪 Robin LOVES al things Viking history and Norse gods. We didn't have enough time to visit Uppsala on our first trip to Sweden but came back just to visit the Royal Mounds!! Legand says these three

entry.title: IKEA meatballs in Sweden > anywhere else 🇸🇪 While in Uppsala we drove by an IKEA and we just HAD to stop by for lunch to eat the famous meatballs in an actual Swedish IKEA!!! 10/10 would recommend. #ikea #ikeameatballs #sweden #uppsala #swedishmeatball
entry.content: IKEA meatballs in Sweden > anywhere else 🇸🇪 While in Uppsala we drove by an IKEA and we just HAD to stop by for lunch to eat the famous meatballs in an actual Swedish IKEA!!! 10/10 would recommend. #ikea #ikeameatballs #sweden #uppsala #swedishmeatball

entry.title: We're in @Apartment Therapy !!!! 😱 When I set out to design the @Whimsy Homes Cabin cabin I told myself I wanted to create a place so special, so colorful and so FUN that the folks at Apartment Therapy would want to feature it. I love them for home decor
entry.content: We're in @Apartment Therapy !!!! 😱 When I set out to design the @Whimsy Homes Cabin cabin I told myself I wanted to create a place so special, so colorful and so FUN that the folks at Apartment Therapy would want to feature it. I love them for home decor

entry.title: Strawberries by the ocean?! yes please!! 🍓 🍓 I love strawberry picking season in California, especially when you can pop down Hwy 1 and pick berries right by the ocean at places like Swanton Berry Farm!! We always make a day of it and stop by a few other
entry.content: Strawberries by the ocean?! yes please!! 🍓 🍓 I love strawberry picking season in California, especially when you can pop down Hwy 1 and pick berries right by the ocean at places like Swanton Berry Farm!! We always make a day of it and stop by a few other

entry.title: Replying to @Luis Fregoso rapid San Francisco studio apartment tour. Convinced all old San Francisco apartments look the same - especially with the old telephone nooks, bay windows, weird closet doors, and real wood floors. #sanfrancisco #apartmenttour #s
entry.content: Replying to @Luis Fregoso rapid San Francisco studio apartment tour. Convinced all old San Francisco apartments look the same - especially with the old telephone nooks, bay windows, weird closet doors, and real wood floors. #sanfrancisco #apartmenttour #s

entry.title: Taylor sang about The Black Dog Pub so I had to go there while in London!! 🐶🇬🇧 ❤️ #theblackdog #taylorswift #ttpd #swiftie #london #londonboy #whimsysoul #england #taylorswiftedit #joealwyn
entry.content: Taylor sang about The Black Dog Pub so I had to go there while in London!! 🐶🇬🇧 ❤️ #theblackdog #taylorswift #ttpd #swiftie #london #londonboy #whimsysoul #england #taylorswiftedit #joealwyn

entry.title: seriously HOW do they do it? If i can't change pretty lil outfits at least twice a day it's not a vacation ✨ #packing #carryononly #traveloutfit #europe #europepacking
entry.content: seriously HOW do they do it? If i can't change pretty lil outfits at least twice a day it's not a vacation ✨ #packing #carryononly #traveloutfit #europe #europepacking

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’
entry.content: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
